about.title:

Business Forward
about.subtitle: We combine deep technical expertise with business understanding to deliver solutions that actually work.
about.description1: Pro IT Guys is a custom software development and business process automation company based in Astana, Kazakhstan. We specialize in building enterprise-grade systems that help businesses scale, automate, and compete in the digital economy.
about.description2: From government information systems to Telegram bots, we deliver end-to-end solutions with a focus on quality, security, and long-term support.

experience.title: 5+ Years Experience
experience.desc: Deep expertise across enterprise and SMB projects in Kazakhstan and CIS

technologies.title: Modern Tech Stack
technologies.desc: React, Node.js, Laravel, PostgreSQL, Docker, FreePBX and more

industries.title: Multiple Industries
industries.desc: Finance, government, education, retail, telecoms and logistics

approach.desc: Iterative delivery with clear milestones and full transparency

services.title: What We Build

crm.desc: Custom CRM solutions to manage customer relationships, track leads, automate follow-ups and boost sales team productivity.

callCenter.desc: Complete call center infrastructure with IVR, intelligent call routing, agent monitoring dashboards and detailed reporting.

freepbx.desc: Professional VoIP telephony solutions using FreePBX and Asterisk for reliable, cost-effective and scalable business communications.

api.desc: Seamless integration of third-party services, payment gateways and internal systems through robust REST and webhook APIs.

support.desc: 24/7 technical support, system monitoring and proactive maintenance to ensure your business runs without interruption.

technologies.title: Technologies We Use
technologies.subtitle: We leverage proven, modern technologies to build reliable and scalable solutions.

portfolio.title: Projects We're Proud Of
portfolio.subtitle: Real solutions delivering real results for our clients.

callCenter.title: Call Center Management System
callCenter.desc: A full-featured call center platform with real-time agent monitoring, intelligent call routing, wallboard dashboards and comprehensive analytics.
callCenter.result: Reduced call handling time by 40%, agent efficiency up 60%

crm.desc: Custom CRM built for a large retail chain managing 100,000+ customers with automated sales pipelines, task management and reporting.

tgPlatform.result: 80% of inquiries automated, response time < 1 minute

whyUs.title: Built Different
whyUs.subtitle: We don't just write code. We build systems that grow with your business.

custom.title: Custom Development
custom.desc: No templates, no shortcuts. Every solution is architectured specifically for your business requirements and workflows.

security.title: Security First
security.desc: Enterprise-grade security practices built into every layer of your application from day one, not bolted on after.

scalable.title: Scalable Architecture
scalable.desc: Systems designed to handle growth — from 100 to 1,000,000 users without costly rewrites or performance degradation.

fast.title: Fast Delivery
fast.desc: Agile development process with clear milestones, weekly demos and on-time delivery you can rely on.

support.title: Long-term Support
support.desc: We stay with you after launch. 24/7 monitoring, regular updates and responsive technical support included.

automation.title: Business Automation
automation.desc: We identify and eliminate manual bottlenecks, turning repetitive tasks into streamlined automated workflows.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: A proven delivery process that ensures quality on every project.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.desc: We dive deep into your business to understand goals, constraints, users and opportunities before planning anything.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.desc: Designing a scalable, secure and maintainable system architecture before writing a single line of code.

development.title: Development
development.desc: Iterative sprints with regular demos and feedback loops to ensure we're always building the right thing.

testing.title: Testing
testing.desc: Comprehensive QA: unit tests, integration tests, load testing and user acceptance testing before every release.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.desc: Smooth production deployment with zero downtime, automated pipelines and instant rollback capabilities.

support.title: Support
support.desc: Ongoing 24/7 monitoring, maintenance, bug fixes and continuous improvement long after launch.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from businesses we've helped transform digitally.

items.name: Aibek Dzhaksybekov
items.text: Pro IT Guys delivered our CRM on time and within budget. The quality exceeded our expectations — our sales team productivity increased by 40% in the first month alone.

items.name: Dinara Serikova
items.text: The call center solution they built handles thousands of daily calls flawlessly. Professional team, transparent communication, and outstanding ongoing support.

items.name: Marat Akhmetov
items.text: Our LMS was delivered in just 3 months. The team understood our vision perfectly and implemented features we hadn't even thought of. Highly recommend.
